purpose: A dropdown selector that combines typing with a scrollable list — user can type to filter or click to choose. Handles known finite lists (10-100 items) better than Select.
whenToUse: 10-100 items in a known list (countries, categories, sizes)
User might know the answer and prefers typing
Values are strings, not numbers or ranges
You need auto-complete but not free-text (which would be Input)
whenNotToUse: More than 100 items — use MultiInput with async search
doRules: Show all matching items as user types (case-insensitive prefix match)
Provide a Reset (X) affordance to clear
Default to placeholder text when empty
Show validation state (Error/Warning/Success) via state property
dontRules: Do not allow arbitrary text if the value must be in the list
Do not scroll the dropdown to more than 8 visible items — use MultiInput for large sets
Do not use for numeric ranges — use Slider or StepInput
Do not hide the dropdown chevron

layoutGuidance.placement: Inline in forms, filter bars, dialogs
layoutGuidance.spacing: Standard field spacing (16px between form rows)
layoutGuidance.alignment: Full width in FormElement; left-aligned in HBox

contentGuidance.contentRules: Item labels are noun phrases; consistent format across items

responsiveBehavior.S: May become full-screen picker on tap

requirements: role='combobox' with aria-expanded reflecting dropdown state
Selected value announced by screen reader
Keyboard: Down opens dropdown; Arrow keys navigate; Enter selects; Escape closes
